title: Command Center UX philosophy, information architecture, and user stories
summary: This Feature ratifies documentation-only successor UX authority for Command Center before production React or API code lands. The implement stage aligned spec.md and ux-spec.md frontmatter, populated index.json with feature metadata and five embedded llm-judge contract clauses, and confirmed every Engineering Spec…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: Five embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec.md evaluated via static semantic review; no contracts.index.json under feature folder.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-09T05:35:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; staged diff limited to spec.md, ux-spec.md, and index.json delivering documentation-only successor Command Center UX authority.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
